title: hymenophyllum pleiocarpum
intro: Hymenophyllum pleiocarpum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the net-veined filmy fern. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum pleiocarpum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
